summary: Project to build a home page interface with three primary user options: List, Rent, and Invest.

existing_features.title: Update the HOME page (route "/", file: frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx) to prominently display a 3-option interface with exactly three primary options: "List", "Rent", and "Invest".
Wire the three HOME page options to existing routes using TanStack Router navigation: "List" navigates to "/listing", "Rent" navigates to "/rent", and "Invest" navigates to "/invest".

new_feature_requests.summary: Create HOME page interface offering 3 options: List, Rent, Invest

projectName: Add three-option HOME page interface (List, Rent, Invest)
